cases.label: ppt1_image1_bar_chart
cases.selection_note: Fallback detect selected the lower note/empty region instead of one chart panel.
cases.context_note: Naive automatic isolation removed the useful chart text surface; full-image OCR is strictly better here.

cases.label: ppt1_image11_table
cases.selection_note: Fallback detect selected a single cell fragment rather than the full table.
cases.context_note: Full-image OCR captured the table structure; crop/isolation reduced OCR to a single token.

combined_runner_observation.interpretation: A combined runner drift exists between ImageSorcery-invoking Python flow and subsequent OCR subprocess execution.

overall_decision.recommended_next_step: Do not fan out automatic object isolation yet. Keep full-image OCR as the immediate context source and use xhigh subagents only for ambiguous boundary triage and prompt-selection review.
